title: OTIF Performance — Mondelez
description: Tracking %OTIF/Ontime/Infull + freshness + anomaly. Công thức canonical theo mondelez/scripts/analysis/otif_mtd_audit.py. RAG ở thresholds, KHÔNG trong SQL.

list.name: whseid
list.label: Kho (whseid)
list.query: SELECT DISTINCT whseid FROM analytics_workspace.mv_otif WHERE whseid != '' ORDER BY whseid

list.name: kenh
list.label: Kênh (group_name)
list.query: SELECT DISTINCT group_name FROM analytics_workspace.mv_otif WHERE group_name != '' ORDER BY group_name

panels.title: Freshness — data tới max_date, trễ ~lag′ (MV refresh 5′)

targets.rawSql: SELECT dateDiff('minute', max(thoi_gian_gui_thau), now()) AS lag_min, toString(toDate(max(thoi_gian_gui_thau))) AS max_date FROM analytics_workspace.mv_otif

SELECT round(100.0*countIf(otif_status='OTIF')/nullIf(count(so),0),2) AS pct_otif FROM analytics_workspace.mv_otif WHERE $__timeFilter(thoi_gian_gui_thau) AND otif_status != 'Không có dữ liệu STM' AND $__conditionalAll(whseid IN (${whseid:singlequote}), $whseid) AND $__conditionalAll(group_name IN (${kenh:singlequote}), $kenh)

SELECT round(100.0*countIf(ontime_status='Ontime')/nullIf(count(so),0),2) AS pct_ontime FROM analytics_workspace.mv_otif WHERE $__timeFilter(thoi_gian_gui_thau) AND otif_status != 'Không có dữ liệu STM' AND $__conditionalAll(whseid IN (${whseid:singlequote}), $whseid) AND $__conditionalAll(group_name IN (${kenh:singlequote}), $kenh)

SELECT round(100.0*countIf(infull_status='Infull')/nullIf(count(so),0),2) AS pct_infull FROM analytics_workspace.mv_otif WHERE $__timeFilter(thoi_gian_gui_thau) AND otif_status != 'Không có dữ liệu STM' AND $__conditionalAll(whseid IN (${whseid:singlequote}), $whseid) AND $__conditionalAll(group_name IN (${kenh:singlequote}), $kenh)

panels.title: Anomaly — đếm kỳ vọng = 0 (drill bằng otif_mtd_audit.py nếu > 0)

targets.rawSql: SELECT 'so NULL/empty' AS check, countIf(so IS NULL OR so='') AS cnt FROM analytics_workspace.mv_otif WHERE $__timeFilter(thoi_gian_gui_thau) UNION ALL SELECT 'whseid empty', countIf(whseid='') FROM analytics_workspace.mv_otif WHERE $__timeFilter(thoi_gian_gui_thau) UNION ALL SELECT 'otif_but_not_ontime', countIf(otif_status='OTIF' AND ontime_status!='Ontime') FROM analytics_workspace.mv_otif WHERE $__timeFilter(thoi_gian_gui_thau) UNION ALL SELECT 'otif_but_not_infull', countIf(otif_status='OTIF' AND infull_status!='Infull') FROM analytics_workspace.mv_otif WHERE $__timeFilter(thoi_gian_gui_thau)

panels.title: Xu hướng %OTIF/Ontime/Infull theo ngày — đường = target

targets.rawSql: SELECT toStartOfDay(thoi_gian_gui_thau) AS time, round(100.0*countIf(otif_status='OTIF')/nullIf(count(so),0),2) AS "% OTIF", round(100.0*countIf(ontime_status='Ontime')/nullIf(count(so),0),2) AS "% Ontime", round(100.0*countIf(infull_status='Infull')/nullIf(count(so),0),2) AS "% Infull" FROM analytics_workspace.mv_otif WHERE $__timeFilter(thoi_gian_gui_thau) AND otif_status != 'Không có dữ liệu STM' AND $__conditionalAll(whseid IN (${whseid:singlequote}), $whseid) AND $__conditionalAll(group_name IN (${kenh:singlequote}), $kenh) GROUP BY time ORDER BY time

panels.title: %OTIF theo kho — đỏ < 85% (top 30 theo số dòng)

targets.rawSql: SELECT multiIf(whseid IS NULL,'(NULL)', whseid='','(rỗng)', whseid) AS dim, round(100.0*countIf(otif_status='OTIF')/nullIf(countIf(otif_status != 'Không có dữ liệu STM'),0),2) AS pct_otif FROM analytics_workspace.mv_otif WHERE $__timeFilter(thoi_gian_gui_thau) AND $__conditionalAll(group_name IN (${kenh:singlequote}), $kenh) GROUP BY dim ORDER BY count() DESC LIMIT 30
